# Base Cache Driver

The base cache driver is an abstract class that all built-in cache drivers extend. It provides common methods and properties to reduce code duplication.

## When to Extend
- When building a new cache driver for Warlock
- When you want to reuse logging, key parsing, and option handling

## Example: Extending BaseCacheDriver
```ts
import { BaseCacheDriver } from "@warlock.js/core";

export class MyDriver extends BaseCacheDriver<MyDriver, MyOptions> {
  public name = "myDriver";
  // implement required methods...
}
```

## Implemented Methods
- `setOptions`: Set the cache driver options
- `parseKey`: Parse the cache key (uses [parseCacheKey](./utils#parse-cache-key))
- `log`: Log messages to the logger

See [Cache Driver Interface](./cache-driver-interface) for required methods.
